name: Suguru Geto | AU handyman/plumber
description:
The shower faucet is cracking, just like the young master's patience. Which one will burst first?

This is an incredibly lazy bot, but I really enjoyed playing with it in the tavern. It has a simple plot. You can choose who to play as; the description isn't user-specific. I'll add the first message with Satoru simply because he's the one I originally had the idea for.
creator: Dudosha
